name: BORGWARNER INC
summary: PARTI BorgWarner Inc. (collectively with its consolidated subsidiaries, the Company or BorgWarner) is a Delaware corporation incorporated in 1987. The Company is a global product leader in clean and efficient technology solutions for combustion, hybrid and electric vehicles. BorgWarners products help improve vehicle performance, propulsion efficiency, stability and air quality.
